name: typeui_get_started
description: Guided one-shot TypeUI setup. Accepts a natural language instruction such as 'use neobrutalism and build a landing page', follows dashboard setup settings, returns enabled local setup actions, and optionally starts a page or section workflow.

instruction.description: Natural language setup request, for example 'use neobrutalism and build a landing page' or 'set up bento and create a pricing section'.

designSystemSlug.description: Optional explicit design skill slug. Overrides natural language design-skill matching.

uiRequest.description: Optional explicit UI request to build after setup. Overrides natural language extraction.

uiType.description: Whether the UI request should be treated as a page or section. Defaults to auto.

sections.description: Optional comma-separated page sections, for example 'navbar, hero, feature, pricing, faq'.
